text: Tell me about yourself.
Why do you want to work here?
What is one weakness you are actively working on?
Describe a time you had to adapt quickly to change.
Describe a challenge you overcame in a team project.
Tell me about a time you handled conflict in a team.
Tell me about a time you failed and what you learned.
Describe a time you had to lead without formal authority.
What is the difference between a stack and a queue?
Explain what an API is in simple terms.
What is the difference between SQL and NoSQL databases?
Explain REST versus GraphQL and when you might choose each.
How would you design a scalable interview feedback platform?
Tell me about a time you made a difficult decision with incomplete information.
Where do you see yourself in five years, and how does this role fit that path?
Tell me about a time you helped a teammate who was struggling.
Describe a time you had to adapt quickly when a plan changed unexpectedly.
Tell me about a time you received tough feedback and had to change your approach.
Describe a conflict with a teammate and how you handled it without hurting the relationship.
Explain a project where you used technology to solve a practical problem.
How would you debug a feature that works locally but fails in production?
Design a system that can handle interview recordings, transcripts, and scoring at scale.
How would you improve the reliability of a real-time video analysis pipeline?
Why do you want to work in this type of role?
What kind of work environment helps you perform at your best?
How would you respond if you strongly disagreed with a manager's decision?
What would you do if you realized you had made a serious mistake on an important project?
